name: Chilbolton Down
overview: Chilbolton Down sits above the River Test valley near Chilbolton and Stockbridge, in open chalk downland with broad rural views. The locality is best known for outdoor space and for proximity to Chilbolton village and observatory/science heritage nearby. It is a low-density rural address where lifestyle is countryside-led, with services mostly accessed in nearby villages and towns.
character: Open chalk-down setting with dispersed homes and a distinctly rural, low-noise atmosphere.
amenities: Limited immediate retail; practical services in Chilbolton/Stockbridge/Andover
Ready access to countryside walks and downland routes
Nearby village pubs and local community amenities in Chilbolton

schools.name: Chilbolton Church of England Primary School

commutes.notes: no station on the down itself

prices.summary: SO20 transactions are typically led by detached and period village housing across the Test Valley.

thingsToDo: Visits to Chilbolton village and local pubs
Trips to Stockbridge high street and nearby heritage sites
placesToEat: The Greyhound on the Test, Stockbridge
pros: Good access to both Stockbridge and Andover
Desirable SO20 environment without dense development
cons: Limited stock can keep pricing firm when listings are scarce
whoItSuits: Best for buyers who want downland scenery and quiet, and who are comfortable driving to schools, stations and supermarkets.
